subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that there is none other God but Him, and He Who hath appeared in the world is, verily, the Most Great Name Who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی اتی فی العالم انه هو الاسم الاعظم الذی
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @station of the Manifestation of God
